messages.message:
Create a professional LinkedIn post about {{$json.theme}} for a biotechnology professional. Include:
- Engaging hook in first line
- 3-4 key insights or tips
- Personal touch or experience
- Call to action for engagement
- Relevant hashtags (max 5)
- Professional but conversational tone

Keep it under 1300 characters.

Create an engaging Facebook post about {{$json.theme}} that:
- Starts with an attention-grabbing question or statement
- Shares valuable insights for biotechnology professionals
- Encourages comments and discussion
- Uses appropriate emojis
- Includes relevant hashtags
- Maintains a friendly, approachable tone

Keep it engaging and shareable.

Create a Twitter thread (3-4 tweets) about {{$json.theme}}:
- Start with a compelling hook
- Share actionable insights
- Use thread format (1/n, 2/n, etc.)
- Include relevant hashtags
- End with engagement question
- Keep each tweet under 280 characters

Make it informative and engaging for the biotech community.

parameters.subject: Weekly Content Generated - {{$node["Generate Content Theme"].json["theme"]}}
